author: doll-agent
content:
Add 7 Chebyshev integ accuracy tests:
- integ_t0_yields_t1_with_zero_constant: T_0 -> T_1 (analytical antiderivative)
- integ_t0_with_nonzero_constant: integration constant is honored
- integ_t1_yields_quarter_t2_plus_quarter_t0: T_2 coefficient must be exactly 1/4
- integ_double_pass_uses_two_constants: integ(2, &[c2, c1]) for ∫∫
- integ_eval_matches_analytical_antiderivative: deriv(integ(p)) == p for degree-3 input
- integ_zero_passes_returns_self: integ(0) is identity
- integ_constant_pads_with_zero_when_k_too_short: missing constants default to 0
